notes: Validated the authored package while preserving the key trust rule: no claim that a final 2026-2027 ministerial school-start date is already confirmed in open sources.
The current page correctly frames 7 September {{year}} as a planning estimate only, while keeping the official-source warning visible for families and school staff.
Focused validation passed with validate-holiday-content, ESLint, typecheck, and seo:validate.
Generated holiday bundles were not regenerated because events:build was intentionally not run, so the rendered route can still lag behind the authored package.
